Function: Provide correct fiber orientation per laminate schedule
Effect: Reduced structural stiffness and strength — potential delamination under load
Cause: Operator error during manual layup — poor template visibility
Current_Control: Layup template + visual inspection after each ply

Function: Maintain correct ply count per laminate schedule
Effect: Laminate thickness deviation — non-compliance with drawing — part rejection
Cause: Operator counting error — no automated ply tracking

Function: Maintain cold chain integrity prior to layup
Effect: Inadequate cure — voids — reduced interlaminar shear strength
Cause: Material out-time tracking failure — label not updated
Current_Control: Material control log + out-time tracking sheet

Function: Allow clean release of part from tool
Failure_Mode: Release film omitted on tool surface
Effect: Part bonded permanently to tool — tool and part scrapped
Cause: Operator oversight during tool prep step

Function: Maintain vacuum integrity throughout cure cycle
Effect: Part exposed to atmosphere — resin bleed-out — void formation
Cause: Sharp prepreg edges puncture bag — inadequate sealant tape coverage
Current_Control: Visual inspection of bag prior to autoclave loading

Function: Seal vacuum bag perimeter to tool flange
Failure_Mode: Sealant tape bridging — loss of seal
Effect: Vacuum leak — uneven compaction — porosity in cured laminate
Cause: Tape not pressed firmly into tool radius — cold shop temperature
Current_Control: Vacuum hold test (>25 inHg for 5 min before cure)

Function: Allow resin bleed and air evacuation during cure
Failure_Mode: Breather cloth blocked by bridging bag
Effect: Resin starvation — dry spots — porosity in surface ply
Cause: Insufficient breather coverage over complex contours

Function: Maintain cure temperature profile per specification
Effect: Resin over-cure — matrix microcracking — reduced toughness
Cause: Controller PID tuning drift — thermocouple calibration error

Function: Maintain cure pressure profile per specification
Cause: Pressure line fitting leak — valve failure
Current_Control: Pressure data logger — in-cycle alarm at ±5 psi deviation

Function: Provide accurate part temperature measurement during cure
Effect: Undetected temperature excursion — invalid cure record — part quarantine
Cause: Thermocouple adhesive failure under autoclave pressure

Function: Transfer cured part from tool without damage
Failure_Mode: Part sticks to tool — forced extraction required
Effect: Part edge damage — surface delamination — part rejection
Cause: Inadequate release agent application — release film failure
Current_Control: Release agent application log — pre-cure inspection

Failure_Mode: Delamination at ply drop during prying
Effect: Internal delamination — non-visible damage — part passes visual but fails NDI
Cause: Excessive prying force applied at wrong location — operator inexperience

Function: Detect subsurface voids and delaminations in cured laminate
Effect: Defective part released to service — in-service structural failure risk
Cause: Reference standard not checked before scan — equipment wear
Current_Control: Pre-scan calibration on reference block per ASTM E2375

Function: Record and disposition all NDI findings per drawing
Failure_Mode: NDI finding not dispositioned — part shipped with open discrepancy
Effect: Non-conforming part in service — regulatory non-compliance — liability
Cause: Paperwork oversight — no electronic routing enforcement
Current_Control: Quality review gate — inspector sign-off required before ship

Function: Drill fastener holes to drawing tolerance (±0.002 in)
Failure_Mode: Hole oversize due to worn drill bit
Effect: Fastener installation failure — joint strength reduction — rework or rejection
Cause: Drill bit not replaced per tool life schedule — no force feedback
Current_Control: Hole diameter inspection per sampling plan (CMM or go/no-go gauge)
